title: Lovable HTML: NEEDED to Get Ranked

pre-rendering service with Cloudflare. I am not a technical web developer. So if I were trying to

service, I would suggest maybe finding someone on Upwork or post on the group and see if somebody

Yeah, if I come to pricing, yeah, so it's $20 a month for three websites. That's, you know,
$6.30 per website per month. So in my mind, it's not worth the effort to have someone else set
this up for me if there's a tool that will do it at this price point. But you might make that
determination differently, or you might decide to do it yourself. Cloudflare is free. A lot of
pre-rendering services are free. That's how this can be so inexpensive, because they're basically
setting up a free thing for you and then taking a long term monthly payment. So I'm not going to
drop an affiliate link. I'm not affiliating for lovable HTML. This is really just the quickest
possible way to get a lovable website so that Google can index it. If you just have it built,
like this one, and even if I went into lovable, I could very easily put a custom domain in here,
and then send it to the client and say, boom, here's your website, isn't it pretty? And they
basically say, oh, my gosh, it's so pretty. I love it. But the challenge is, of course,
Google can't render this website. AI can't render this website. If you take this domain and you
give it to Cloud or chat GPT and say, hey, go crawl this website, tell me what you see,
it will say that it can't crawl the website. It's just because of the way that lovable
builds its websites. So anyway, lovable HTML fixes that. So if you're building these websites to
actually get them to rank, you need to put something in place so that Google and the AI tools can
actually see it.

summary: This lesson explains how to use Lovable HTML for creating websites that can be indexed by Google and AI tools. It is recommended due to its ease-of-use, affordability, and one-click setup compared to manual pre-rendering services.

affordable pricing at $20/month for three websites
